event_info: tossed up on off; Abhishek leans well forward on the defensive push
flighted delivery on off; punched off the back-foot to long-off for a single
nicely tossed up outside off - a one-handed drive to long-off for a single
clubbed; flighted delivery on off and Abhishek doesn't miss out; it's right in the slot and he clears his front-leg on the hoick; sends it soaring over long-on for a maximum
much better from Narine; tossed up on off and it's pushed onto the off-side
fraction short and drifting onto the body; Abhishek stays back and stabs it in front of mid-off; a quick single is the result
short of a good length and just outside off - steered square on the off-side for a single
nicely played; short of a good length and angling across the left-hander - Head stands tall and then plays the cut; places it backward of square on the off-side and beats the fielder in the deep
back of a length and angling across the left-hander - Head doesn't get hold of the pull and the fielder at mid-wicket cuts it off with a dive

on a good length and angling across the left-hander - Head stayed on the back-foot and threw his hands on the lofted drive; carved it high and in front of square on the off-side; couple of bounces and the ball rolls away
back-to-back boundaries for Head - too short from Arora; Head swivels across and then muscles the pull over mid-on; wasn't perfectly timed and the ball dropped in front of the ropes
clubbed; too short from Arora; not sure if this was indeed the plan? Head picks the length early; swivels across and then hammers the pull past square leg; 17 off the over
flighted delivery on the leg-stump line; nudged wide of square leg for a single
flighted delivery on middle and leg; punched off the back-foot to mid-on
fraction short and just outside off - Head backs away and picks out cover with the cut
smashed; too full and too straight from Narine; on the pad and Head swipes it over square leg; has plenty on the shot and the ball sails into the crowd
even Narine isn't been spared now; fraction too full and in the slot - Head leans forward and then hammers the drive over mid-on; bounces away to the ropes
Narine tosses one on the leg-stump line - Head backs away and cuts it straight to the fielder at cover-point
a thick leading edge; but third man is inside the ring and the ball bounces away to the ropes - fuller length delivery and pushed across the left-hander; Abhishek was looking to swing across the line
back of a length and at the stumps; Abhishek is cramped for room on the pull and miscues it behind square on the on-side
the slower short ball outside off - Head backs away and is undone on the cut; but it's too high and has been wided
short of a good length and at the pads; clipped behind square on the on-side for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Cameron Green!! A top-edge on the pull and it's a simple catch for Green at mid-wicket - Tyagi stuck to the plan of bowling short
event_info: it's into the body of the left-hander and Abhishek has no room on the pull; cramped for space; he went through with the shot and the ball caught the top-edge. Lobbed up and Green moved to his left to complete the catch. Abhishek Sharma c Cameron Green b Kartik Tyagi 15(10) [4s-1 6s-1]
a leading edge and the ball lobs over the bowler's head - back of a length and angling into the left-hander; Kishan was early into the tuck; closed the face of the bat and the ball popped up
short of a good length and at the stumps; nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - Kishan prods across and defends it to the off-side
short of a good length and well wide of off; steered down to third man for a single
clattered; short of a good length and well wide of off; Head reaches out and then flat-bats the drive over extra-cover; couple of bounces and over the ropes
back-to-back boundaries for Head - tad fuller from Green; but there's a hint of width on offer; enough for Head to drive it over wide mid-off; runs away to the ropes
a one-handed swipe and the inside edge runs away fine; the fielder in the deep is very square and has no chance - on a length and angling into the left-hander; Head swings hard and gets away
banged in short and at the stumps; Head backs away and pulls it past square leg for a single
slower short ball around off; was bowled into the pitch - Head backs away and picks out mid-off with the drive
yorker length delivery on off; Head makes room and jams it to the left of mid-off for a single
that's too easy for Kishan - back of a length and at his hips; he gets inside the line and pummels the pull into the stands at deep backward square leg
nicely played; back of a length and pushed across the left-hander; Kishan arches back slightly; uses Tyagi's pace and then runs it backward of square on the off-side
short of a good length and just outside off; tucked past square leg for a single
fuller length delivery at the stumps; Head backs away and went hard on the drive; the bat turned on impact and he skews an inside edge to the on-side
flighted delivery from round the wicket - Kishan goes back and defends it to the on-side
fraction short and at the stumps; Kishan rocks back and pulls it down to long-on

a bad fumble and it costs KKR three extra runs - Anukul Roy the fielder - was tossed up and sliding into the left-hander; swept away over backward square leg - Anukul runs across to his right; lets the ball bounce and it then bursts through his hands
flighted delivery on off; punched in front of square on the off-side
tossed up just outside off; dropped into the gap wide of cover-point
lovely; a 22-ball fifty for Head and the crowd love it - was tossed up on off; right in the slot and it's a free swing for the left-hander; he leans forward and then hoists it high over long-on
slower ball on middle; worked wide of mid-wicket for a single
short and from round the wicket - a half-arm jab past square leg for a single
fuller length delivery outside off - driven square on the off-side for a single
short and wide of off; Head reaches out on the cut and toe-ends it in front of square on the off-side; the ball bounces wide of long-off and it's only a single
slower ball on off; worked into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a single

a good over from Vaibhav; just 5 off it; slower short ball outside off; was bowled into the pitch and it didn't come onto the left-hander; Head was through with the shot early; the ball catches the cue-end and rolls towards short third
the boundaries keep coming; but this was sheer timing - Kishan comes down the pitch and then punches one back past the non-striker; beats long-on to his right
clubbed; dragged short by Chakaravarthy - Kishan rocks back; picks the length and hammers the pull past mid-wicket
tossed up well wide of off; Kishan reaches out and inside halves the drive to long-off
slower and wider of off as Head backed away; it's past the tramlines and has been wided
pushed through quicker and on off; punched back at the bowler
cracking shot; tossed up well wide of off - Head gets down low and then carves the drive high over long-off; sails into the stands and brings up SRH's 100

ball_event: out Caught by Cameron Green!! That's the end of Head and Green has his second catch of the day - was pushed through quicker by Chakaravarthy
event_info: Head picked the length and then swivelled across on the pull; but he's undone by the pace and doesn't get hold of the shot. Straight down deep mid-wicket's throat where Green went reverse-cupped. Travis Head c Cameron Green b Varun Chakaravarthy 61(28) [4s-9 6s-3]
tossed up on off; defended back at the bowler
fraction short and just outside off - pulled through mid-wicket for a single
flighted delivery on middle and leg; punched off the back-foot to the bowler
flighted delivery on middle and leg; Klaasen goes back and gets an under-edge which ricochets off the pad
tossed up on off; Klaasen backs away and picks out Rahane at cover with the cut
nicely tossed up outside off - Klaasen leans across and inside halves the push-drive to long-on; off the mark with a single
133.7kph; length ball on off; punched to cover

139.1kph; Klaasen goes for the big shot. It's a chance and it goes down. Length ball; Klaasen stands tall to swing it over long-on. the timing isn't spot-on as it comes off the bottom part of the bat. Rinku moves to his right at long-on and stays side-on to take catch. Not a straightforward chance but he's let the ball burst through his palms and it goes over the rope
length ball; Klaasen brings his wrists into play to flick it over midwicket

ball_event: out Caught by Rovman Powell!! Wow! That's a spectacular one-handed catch from Rovman Powell in the deep. The TV umpire has been summoned to check if it's a fair catch. The West Indian moved to his right (covered 15m) at deep midwicket and then leapt to pluck it out of thin air with his right hand. The left palm falls on the ground first
event_info: Powell tumbles but ensures that the ball isn't grounded. He's in total control of the ball and that'll be deemed as fair catch. Big wicket! Klaasen departs for 11; his lowest score this season. Coming to the ball; it was banged in short by Green and Klaasen could only get a top-edge on his pull. Heinrich Klaasen c Rovman Powell b Cameron Green 11(8) [4s-1 6s-1]
136.1kph; pitched up; driven to cover
Smaran Ravichandran gets off the mark with a boundary. Shoulder-high short ball and Smaran rolls his wrists to pull it through backward square leg. In full control of his shot
104.3kph; over the wicket; very full; Ishan Kishan drills it back to the bowler and the ball hits the bowler's left boot. Varun is in pain
round the wicket; drifting in towards middle; Smaran closes the bat-face early and gets a leading edge to cover

ball_event: out Caught by Ajinkya Rahane!! Miscue and gone! 92.7kph
event_info: length ball; Smaran Ravichandran shimmies down the pitch to loft it downtown and ends up slicing it a long way up in the air off the leading edge. Rahane; at extra cover; calls for it; keeps his eyes on the ball and pouches it safely. The ball actually spun away a bit as well. Smaran Ravichandran c Ajinkya Rahane b Varun Chakaravarthy 4(4) [4s-1]

1 run; flighted delivery; spins back in and goes through the gate as Aniket Verma gets forward to push at it. Beats the inside edge and bounces over the stumps. Even the keeper can't gather it cleanly. Beautiful delivery!
full delivery; driven to long-off
fraction short; chopped towards the point region
138.2kph; short of length; nudged to midwicket
138.3kph; short of a good length; Aniket walks across to flick it to deep square leg
130.6kph; leg-lined shortish ball; Ishan Kishan swivels to pull. Hits the thigh and goes to the keeper on the bounce. Not sure if there was any bat on it
128.1kph; tennis ball bounce as Green goes short; Ishan Kishan looks to play the forearm-pull and misses. Wided for height
124.8kph; angling down leg; Ishan Kishan pulls hard and the ball goes fine of the short fine leg fielder off the batter's pad
short of length delivery; punched to cover

126kph; Ishan Kishan looks to jab this short of length ball through the on-side. The ball seemed to move in a bit off the deck as well. Beats the inside edge; bounces over the stumps and goes to the keeper on the bounce
with a slip in place; Varun bowls a flighted in-drifter from over the wicket; Aniket watchfully defends it back to the bowler
99.8kph; leggie on a short of length; Aniket defends off the back foot

edge and four! Tossed up ball; full and wide of off; Aniket walks across to slog across the line and gets a fat outside edge that just eludes the diving Kartik Tyagi to his left at short third man. Varun is livid as he expected the fielder to be finer

ball_event: out Caught by Ajinkya Rahane!! Third wicket for Varun Chakaravarthy. Another fine catch
event_info: this time from the captain. 95.5kph; fullish leggie; Aniket gets down to slog it downtown. The ball lobs up off the top-edge. Rahane moves back from cover and stays side-on; keeps his eyes on the ball on the move and catches with hands outstretched. Aniket Verma c Ajinkya Rahane b Varun Chakaravarthy 6(8) [4s-1]
spins back in from a length; Salil Arora doesn't pick it and gets hit on the thigh after getting beaten on the inside edge
fuller ball and Salil Arora pushes it defensively into the off-side. Varun finishes with 4-0-36-3 and goes off the field
back of a length; pulled to deep midwicket
pacy short of length delivery on leg; Salil Arora misses the glance and the ball dies down on the on-side off his thigh pad
143.9kph; width on offer; Salil Arora dabs it to deep backward point
quick hands from Ishan Kishan to cut this wid-ish ball; straight to backward point though
116.4kph; slower ball bouncer; Ishan Kishan gently pulls it to backward square leg
121.1kph; off-speed short ball and that's been pulled to deep midwicket

ball_event: out Bowled!! Cleaned up! 200th IPL wicket for Sunil Narine. 92.9kph
event_info: carrom ball on a length; Salil Arora expects the ball to spin in but it goes the other way slightly to beat the outside edge and crash into the off-stump. Salil Arora b Sunil Narine 2(6)
drifting in towards leg and Cummins gets off the mark by turning it to deep square leg
96.1kph; on a length and wide of off; Cummins shoulders arms
96.2kph; offbreak; Cummins pushes from the crease and inside-halves it through mid-on
Ishan Kishan breaks the shackles. He waltzes down the pitch; converts this carrom ball into a half-volley and clobbers it over cow corner for a mighty six

ball_event: out Caught by Anukul Roy!! SIX and OUT! 91.6kph
event_info: on a length and wide of off. It's the offie on this occasion. Ishan Kishan shimmies down once again to try and hit another six. Looks to thump it downtown. He isn't quite close to the pitch of the ball on this occasion and loses his shape as he swings hard. More height than distance and it's a pretty straightforward catch for Anukul Roy at long-off. SRH lose their 7th wicket with four overs to spare. Narine finishes with 2/31 off his 4 overs. Ishan Kishan c Anukul Roy b Sunil Narine 42(29) [4s-4 6s-2]
flat length ball on off; punched to cover
93.6kph; the line is too straight on this occasion and Cummins helps it on its way to deep backward square leg
92.1kph; width on offer; Shivang Kumar cuts to sweeper cover off the back foot
88.1kph; shortened length wide of off; Cummins stands tall and smites it over long-on. Not quite off the middle of the bat but he's managed to clear long-on
yorker; dug out

Anukul Roy throws the ball up in the air and claims the catch. The TV umpire has been summoned. Anukul Roy gets low on his followthrough to take a low catch. The fingers seem to be under the ball. A couple of replays needed for Ulhas Gandhe to rule it in favour of the bowling side. So; another one bites the dust. Anukul was certain that he caught it cleanly. Full and wide of off; Cummins flat-batted the slap straight back at the bowler. It seemed to dip on the batter but the bowler did well to catch it. Pat Cummins c and b Anukul Roy 10(8) [6s-1]

ball_event: out Caught by Angkrish Raghuvanshi!! Slower ball into the deck just down leg from Vaibhav Arora
event_info: Shivang Kumar looks to pull and the keeper appeals for caught behind. The umpire; however; deems it as a wide. Rahane sends it upstairs. Clear spike on UltraEdge and it's off the glove. Successful review and SRH lose their ninth wicket. Shivang Kumar c Angkrish Raghuvanshi b Vaibhav Arora 1(2)
Angkrish Raghuvanshi half-appeals again; nothing from Vaibhav Arora. 136.2kph; angling away outside off on a length; Malinga slashes and misses
138.7kph; very full outside off; Eshan Malinga is beaten for pace as he looks to squeeze it out
fullish ball down leg; Eshan Malinga glances and misses
99.1kph; slower ball; low full toss; Malinga bunts it to long-on
low full toss; pushed down to long-off
117.6kph; pace off delivery; back of a length and wide of off; Eshan Malinga lets it be
120.3kph; slow; short and wide of off; Harshal Patel hops and reaches for it to cut. Expertly finds the gap between short third man and backward point
143.9kph; on a length and wide of off; Harshal slashes and misses
143.1kph; back of a length; punched to deep point
144.9kph; pacy away-angler on a short of length; Malinga fiddles his bat at it with cemented feet and gets beaten on the outside edge
back of a length; Malinga backs away a bit and taps it towards mid-off for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Vaibhav Arora!! SRH have been bundled out for 165! Slower ball bouncer
event_info: Eshan Malinga looks to pull and top-edges to short fine leg. Arora moves to his left to take the catch. This is the first time SRH have been bowled out in this season. Harshal Patel c Vaibhav Arora b Kartik Tyagi 6(5) [4s-1]
that's so easy for Rahane - a juicy full-toss on the pads and it's whipped into the gap wide of mid-on; runs away to the ropes
tossed up on off; driven down to long-off for a single
flighted delivery on the leg-stump line; Allen goes back and clips it past mid-wicket for a single
tossed up just outside off; driven to the left of the bowler
flighted delivery on off; Rahane wristily works it to the right of mid-on for a single
fraction short and at the pads; Allen goes back and whips it past mid-wicket for a single
fuller length delivery on the pads; driven down to long-on for a single
short and at the hips; nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - defended off the back-foot to the off-side
short of a good length and just outside off - no room for Allen as he punches it off the back-foot to mid-off

Ishan Kishan goes up in an appeal; but Cummins doesn't look interested; back of a length and rising onto the right-hander; Allen was shaping for the back-foot and is undone by the bounce. Nothing on the UltraEdge

short and at the stumps - Allen picks the length early; swivels across and then hammers the pull over square leg; the fielder in the deep runs to his left; but the ball bounces wide of him and past the ropes
on a good length and around off; Rahane prods across and pushes it back at the bowler
fuller length delivery outside off; a punchy drive; but straight to the fielder at mid-off
lovely; a leg-stump half-volley and Rahane nonchalantly flicks it over deep backward square leg; used the pace on the ball and sends it over the ropes for the first maximum
full and on off; Rahane went hard on the drive; the bat turned on impact and he skews an inside edge to mid-wicket
short of a good length and just outside off - Rahane stays back on the push to cover
low full-toss from Malinga - Rahane backs away; opens the face of the bat and then pierces the gap past point; chase for the fielder and he's back for the second

that's a horror delivery from Cummins - tried to get away from Allen's hitting zone as the batter shuffled across; it's miles past the tramlines and beats Ishan Kishan's dive. Having shuffled across; Allen tried to scoop and missed

clubbed ; back of a length and at the stumps - Allen swivels across; picks the length and then hammers the pull over deep square leg - the fielder thought he had a chance; but can only watch it sail over his outstretched hands
fuller length delivery on off; Allen goes hard on the drive and skews a thick inside edge past mid-wicket; comes back for the second
thumped; that's a massive hit - short of a good length and at the stumps; Allen picks the length early; stays on the front-foot and then pulls it high into the stands; a 77m hit
cracking shot; Cummins is all over the place at the moment; fuller length delivery outside off and Allen drives it on the rise; up and over mid-off for a boundary
crunched; tad too short from Cummins - Allen swivels across and then drills the pull past square leg; two men in the deep; but he's placed it right between them

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! Cummins has his man
event_info: but the damage has been done. On a good length and angling into the right-hander; Allen was a tad too early into the flick; the ball caught the lower half and spooned towards deep mid-wicket - Klaasen runs in from the deep; keeps his eyes on the ball and completes a good low catch. 27 runs and a wicket off the over. Finn Allen c Heinrich Klaasen b Pat Cummins 29(13) [4s-3 6s-2]
tossed up on the leg-stump line; eased down to long-on for a single
Abhishek tosses one slower and just outside off - makes Angkrish lunge into the drive and the ball rolls off the inner half to mid-wicket
pushed through flatter and just outside off - cut straight to the fielder at cover-point
tossed up just outside off - Raghuvanshi backs away and can't beat backward point with the cut
slower and drifting onto the pads; tucked behind square on the on-side for a single
nicely played; tossed up slower and just outside off - Rahane waits on it; opens the face of the bat and then threads the gap past point with precision on the drive; runs away to the ropes in a hurry
whipped; on a length and angling into the right-hander - Raghuvanshi picks the length and then brings his wrists into play; shovelling it over deep backward square leg for a maximum
on a good length and just outside off - Raghuvanshi leans forward on the push-drive to mid-off
a shy at the bowler's end and Raghuvanshi had to dive to make his ground; was a soft nudge in front of mid-wicket and it was his call for a quick single
fuller length delivery on the pads; clipped through mid-wicket for a single. Was the slower ball from Malinga
lovely shot; another length ball angling into the right-hander and Raghuvanshi has plenty of time on the pick-up pull - plays with the angle and hits it high over long leg
Malinga alips in the leg-stump yorker and spi8lls it well down leg; called as a wide
low full-toss on the pads and it's flicked behind square on the on-side for a single
dragged short by Shivang; pulled down to long-on for a single
top-edge and four; dropped short by Shivang; extra bounce though and Rahane can't control the cut; gets a thick top-edge thaty runs past the vacant slip region
tossed up just outside off; pushed down to long-off for a single
flighted delivery on off; punched off the back-foot to long-on
tossed up on off; pushed off the back-foot to the off-side
flighted delivery outside off; punched down to long-off for a run
short of a length and into the pitch; pulled past square leg for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - chopped down towards third man for a single
on a length and at the stumps; punched down to long-on for a single
cracking shot; short of a good length and well wide of off - Raghuvanshi plays late and bludgeons the cut past point; races away to the square boundary
the slower bouncer; but it's well down leg and has been wided
slower ball at the pads; nudged behind square on the on-side for a single
full-toss from Harshal; punched down to long-on for a single
full-toss from Shivang; driven on the bounce to long-on
tossed up and sliding across the right-hander; stabbed square on the off-side for a single
loopy delivery wide of off - Rahane squirts a thick edge on the drive over cover-point
lovely shot; tad too full and sliding down leg - Raghuvanshi bends down low; rolled his wrists and then swept it behind square on the on-side for a boundary
fraction short and just outside off; was pushed through quicker and Raghuvanshi chops it behind square on the off-side; comes back for the second
tossed up just outside off - punched down to long-off for a single
a gentle loosener from Sakib; full and down leg - past Raghuvanshi's flick and brushed the pads on its way to the keeper - Ishan Kishan appeals for a caught behind; but they don't review
short of a good length and just outside off - dropped wide of cover-point for a single
very full and slanting down leg; past Rahane's flick and has been wided
fuller length delivery on the pads; driven down to long-on for a single
fuller length delivery outside off; a crisp drive to the right of cover - the fielder dives and gets a hand onto it; deflecting the ball down to long-off
a top-edge; but the ball drops safely between mid-wicket and deep mid-wicket - short of a good length and Rahane was early into the pull
slower ball outside off - driven into the gap wide of cover for a single
135.6kph; fullish ball; tapped to cover-point
133.5kph; Rahane goes after this short-pitched ball with a pull shot. Hits him high on the bat and falls well short of deep backward square leg
140.6kph; bouncer from round the wicket; Angkrish Raghuvanshi shapes to pull and mishits towards wide mid-on
round the wicket to Rahane as well. Short ball and the KKR captain swivels to pull it to deep backward square leg
142kph; pitched up ball; Angkrish was probably expecting another short ball. He isn't fully forward to drive and inside-edges towards midwicket
chest-high short ball; Angkrish Raghuvanshi short-arm-jabs it to deep midwicket
113.5kph; slower ball on a length outside off; chopped to cover
short ball; Angkrish Raghuvanshi hurriedly pulls it to midwicket. Rahane eyes a single; Angkrish denies
full delivery; flicked to midwicket and Rahane gets sent back again. The KKR captain smiles
just over the keeper! 109.5kph; slower ball into the deck; it's head-high and Angkrish Raghuvanshi waits for the ball to periscope it over the leaping keeper
nicely played by Angkrish Raghuvanshi. It's almost in the blockhole; the right-hander stays deep in his crease to flick it through backward square leg. Back-to-back fours
short and Angkrish Raghuvanshi pulls it throug backward square leg
90.1kph; flighted outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi goes for the expansive drive and outside-edges towards short third man
another googly; full and wide of off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi leans across to slap-drive and gets beaten on the outside edge
too full on this occasion; driven along the ground to long-off
beaten! Wrong 'un on a length outside off; Rahane tries to late-cut and misses
Rahane goes on the back foot to punch this googly to deep extra cover
low full toss outside off; driven down to long-off
132.1kph; shortish ball; Angkrish Raghuvanshi hops and cuts to backward point
slow and short; pulled along the ground to fine leg
Ajinkya Rahane backs away early and exposes all his stumps. Harshal Patel bowls short and the batter fails to make contact as he slashes
top-edge and four! 134.9kph; on-pace bouncer; Rahane stands tall and jumps a bit to pull. Fat edge and the ball goes to fine leg. A couple of bounces and into the fence
pitched up delivery from wide of the crease; driven hard along the ground to long-off

119.3kph; off-speed delivery; very full and that's been knocked down to long-on. After three low scores; Angkrish Raghuvanshi comes back with a mature half-century. This is also his third fifty of the season
139kph; short of length wide of off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi stands tall to cut it to deep point
116.1kph; off-cutter on a shortish length. Rahane gets cramped for room and gets hit on the glove as he awkwardly tries to fend it into the leg-side
another dot. Slower ball into the deck at 114.9kph; Rahane gets inside the line and is early into his pull shot. Hits the glove and goes towards the keeper
short outside off; Rahane glides it to third man

back of a length well outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi slashes and misses. That's been wided and Cummins has reviewed it. The batter barely moved and the ball is well outside the tramline. Since it's close to the bat; the TV umpire asks for the UltraEdge and there's a flat line. So; it's a wide and SRH burn a review
118.5kph; off-cutter on a back of a length; steered to third man

ball_event: out Caught by Smaran Ravichandran!! Gone! 138.4kph
event_info: pace-on short ball. No room on offer as well. Rahane hurriedly pulls and the ball lobs up in the air off the splice of the bat. A sitter for Smaran Ravichandran at square leg and he doesn't err. The plan was to bowl short to Rahane after the strategic break and it has worked. Ajinkya Rahane c Smaran Ravichandran b Sakib Hussain 43(36) [4s-4 6s-1]

1 run; short ball from round the wicket; Angkrish Raghuvanshi shapes to pull and gets hits on the ribcage as he's a bit early into the stroke. He takes the single but he's in pain and the physio is out to tend to him
131.7kph; round the wicket; back of a length delivery; Rinku makes room to steer it to third man and gets off the mark with a single

nicely played! 144.2kph; as expected; it's another short ball from Cummins. Angkrish Raghuvanshi slightly backs away; hops and upper-cuts it over and wide of the keeper. Plays it fine and hence third man has no chance of stopping that
134.8kph; short again; a controlled pull shot to deep square leg follows
Rinku Singh backs away; Cummins tries to follow him and sprays this short ball well down leg. Rinku ducks and evades. Ishan Kishan dives to his right and takes pace off it
slower ball into the pitch; Angkrish Raghuvanshi waits and closes the bat-face at the last moment to gently pull it to fine leg
139.2kph; bouncer to end the over; Rinku ducks under it. Pat Cummins finishes with 1/47 off his 4 overs
googly outside off; cut to deep point off the back foot
full and in the slot; KKR's in-form batter - Rinku - gets down on one leg to slogsweep it over deep midwicket. 88m six
Rinku goes on the back foot to chop this legbreak to point

ball_event: out Caught by Eshan Malinga!! Flighted ball
event_info: full in length; Angkrish Raghuvanshi looks to play an aerial drive over extra cover but the timing goes awry as googly spins away a bit. He ends up slicing it straight down long-off's throat. Angkrish Raghuvanshi c Eshan Malinga b Shivang Kumar 59(47) [4s-5 6s-2]
with a slip in place; Shivang bowls a low full toss at 86.2kph; eased to the right of long-on
googly on a length; Green stays back to push it to the left of the non-striker

117.4kph; pace off; Rinku tucks it to midwicket for a quick single. The fielder has a shy at the bowler's end. Misses the target and there's no fielder backing up. Shivang Kumar was the fielder but a direct-hit there would have been curtains for Rinku. Instead; he gets five runs
shortened length; tucked to fine leg
131.2kph; short ball; Rinku Singh sways away from it

139.3kph; full and down leg; a shuffling Rinku flicks and misses. That's not been wided and Rinku reviews it. The TV umpire also deems it as a fair delivery as the batter moved across. KKR lose a review and there's a chat between the umpire and Cummins
132kph; short ball; Rinku belatedly tries to upper-cut and misses
113.9kph; off-speed back of a length; heaved away to deep square leg
tries to bowl the slower one and ends up bowling it down leg
141.7kph; fullish delivery outside the leg-stump; Rinku backs away and brings his wrists into play to chip it over mid-on. A couple of bounces and into the fence. Scores level

Rinku Singh hits the winning runs! Short ball; the left-hander walks forward and across the slam the pull well in front of square on the leg-side. The ball reaches the fence in a jiffy and KKR win by 7 wickets
